body.title: Fix test_stop_terminates_owned_process in test_adc_shim.py
body.result: already fixed in ef7a6e72 — stop/rollback tests aligned with device delegation design; 16/16 pass
body.description:
TestIgorADCShimStartStopRestart::test_stop_terminates_owned_process fails: IgorADCShim.stop() logs 'Igor does not own the process, no-op' and returns True without calling process.terminate(). The test mocks the process and asserts terminate() was called once, but the ownership check fails so terminate is never called.

Pre-existing failure — not introduced by T-theigors-to-uu-migration.

**Affected files:** tests/igor/test_adc_shim.py, devices/igor/adc_shim.py (or wherever the stop() ownership check lives)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; no persistence — unit test fix
**Scope boundary:** IN — fix the test or the ownership check so stop() terminates a process the shim started; OUT — don't change IgorADCShim lifecycle semantics
**Completion criteria:** `python -m pytest tests/igor/test_adc_shim.py -q` passes green, including test_stop_terminates_owned_process
